trivia_bullets.text: Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK, 2024-09-27) is a top-down horror set inside a single haunted mansion plane ruled by demon Valgavoth. Set explicitly draws on 1970s-90s slasher film tropes — Chainsaw (Texas Chain Saw Massacre), Break Down the Door (The Shining), Found Footage (The Blair Witch Project). Killer's Mask fits squarely in the slasher-killer archetype the set was designed to evoke.
sources: Wizards of the Coast, 'First Look at Duskmourn: House of Horror,' magic.wizards.com, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Manifest Dread on entry creates a face-down 2/2 creature (opponent doesn't know what's under the mask), then self-equips. Design team described manifest dread as Hitchcockian suspense — 'threat of the unknown' rather than shock. The Equipment-plus-manifest-on-entry delivers both a body and an armed menace threat from one card. Previewed via TikTok from Good Games Morley on 2024-09-11.
sources: Wizards of the Coast, 'Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics,' magic.wizards.com, 2024, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 19142. Uncommon at {2}{B}; self-equipping on entry provides immediate board presence rare in Equipment cards. Legal in Standard, Historic, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander.
Art by Wero Gallo. The Scryfall artist search for Wero Gallo returns a small number of MTG credits, suggesting this is an earlier or less common MTG commission for the artist.
sources: Scryfall artist search a:"wero gallo", via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.name: Chainsaw
related_cards.note: Same set Equipment in the slasher-implements subtheme
